provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Fish Protection Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content:
2. Interpretation
In this Act, unless the context otherwise requires—
"authorised officer" means a person authorised by the Minister for the purposes of this Act;
"fish" includes all vertebrate fishes, and the spat, brood, fry, spawn, ova and young thereof.

definitions.definition: a person authorised by the Minister for the purposes of this Act
all vertebrate fishes, and the spat, brood, fry, spawn, ova and young thereof.
